tasks.title: Achieve feature parity across all runners
evidence: Gemini runner hardcodes --approval-mode yolo in both run and resume paths (runners.rs).
Claude runner always appends --verbose and uses --permission-mode, with the builder defaulting to bypassPermissions when no explicit mode is provided (runners.rs, command.rs).
Resume flags diverge: Codex uses exec resume <thread_id>, OpenCode uses run -s <session_id>, and Gemini/Claude/Cursor use --resume <id> (runners.rs).
Output format flags are inconsistent: Codex uses --json, OpenCode uses --format json, Gemini/Claude/Cursor use --output-format stream-json (command.rs, runners.rs).
Streaming output parsing only attempts full-line JSON and falls back to emitting raw lines, so non-JSON interleaving is handled as passthrough today (stream.rs).
plan: Plan has already been written to .ralph/cache/plans/RQ-0303.md. You may skip the context_builder for this task only.
Run --help for codex/opencode/gemini/claude/agent to inventory supported flags for resume, output format, approval/permission, verbose, and sandbox/plan modes.
Define standardized runner options in crates/ralph/src/contracts/config.rs (and schema/docs) for shared settings like approval/permission mode, verbose, output format, and resume behavior.
Extend RunnerCommandBuilder with normalized option helpers and refactor crates/ralph/src/runner/execution/runners.rs to map each runner to the shared options.
Adjust streaming/parsing in process.rs + stream.rs/json.rs to handle mixed JSON and non-JSON output consistently across runners, including session-id extraction.
Add or expand tests under crates/ralph/src/runner/execution/tests/ to cover parity scenarios (resume flag mapping, output format, approval/permission settings, mixed stdout/stderr).
Update docs/cli.md, docs/configuration.md, and schemas/config.schema.json to reflect any new or renamed runner settings.
notes: AgentConfig currently exposes only Claude-specific permission mode; there are no generic approval/verbosity/output-format settings in config yet (contracts/config.rs).
Removed stale dependencies (RQ-0297, RQ-0299) that are not present in the current queue.
